title: OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: ST MARY'S HOME FOR BOYS OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health services, individual, group, and family therapy. Psychological assessments, outpatient sex offender, and fire setting treatment are also available. 16535 SW Tualatin Valley Highway Beaverton, OR 970035143 Eligibility: Children and adolescents Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 259-3148 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 259-3148 Cindy Krieger Reception (503) 649-5651 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Completed outpatient packet AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus Line #57 Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Group Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST MARY'S HOME FOR BOYS
